violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw beef and eggs were stored above butter in the refrigerator.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Edge of the countertop was missing trim and is bare wood, needs to be a smooth nonabsorbent surface.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. No hand soap was available by the hand sink in the kitchen.
